TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u saadingan a aadupan kakiliman i Taywan, u masadumaay ku liwliw nu tahakay , idaw ku sakasenengan nu kitakitay a tademaw kina aadihan sa, idaw ku ayam, mikalicay, idaw ku mingaduyay, idaw ku cilkay, mubahelay, hatini kayadah nu aadih han sa, nika tada katuud tu ku tademaw ayda idaw ku mitastasay u miadupay, sisa a mamalawpes tu ku aadupan, mabiyalaw tu ku miading tu aadupan. u sihu mabilil tu a miading tu aadupan, matalaw malawpes ku ŚčēÁČ©, sisa misasumad tu mikuwan kina aadupan kya a idaw tu ku aadingan nu aadupan kyu idaw ku sakay tini i lalay nu tatanga' han a pakatineng tu tademaw a hinin nu mita tina kawawan a padihing tu aadupan. nilacul i Taywan a adingan nu aadupan pitu ku masasudumaay. sakacacay:paypacucuwan idaw ku padaduki, ungay, tumay, sikuyu, nu puyuay a nani. paycucuan hananay sa, u namakayniay i nu udip nu idang namakabala'ay muhanhan kya makay i cucu' tu wasisalang tu sapacucu' tu wawa, namakayni kya ngangan tu sasakamuan kina paycucuan sa (idaw kya cacay a cudad i 2005 tu mihcaan tu nasulitan sa, idaw aca tu 5676 tu ya nisulitan tu 2008 ay tu cudad, LUCN tu sumanahay a cudad tu 5488 hamin) tu caay kalecad a aadupan, mabuliyas i 1229 tu wini, 153 a sasulitan atu 29 hamin ku namakayniay a sapacucuay a aadupan tu 10%, kina aadupan i kitaki sa idaw tu 0.4% saan, u singipenay idaw ku nu babuy nu bayuay sa, mubahelay tu paycucuay a aadupan, u sayadahay a aadupan. sakatusa:payayam izaw ku takelulu, lidep, tuluk nu buyuay a banul, tanayuay nu tangil a deku. sakatulu:paynabuy izaw ku bilanga', kakitil, kakuhkuh, cacucuh. sakasepat:payngaduy nabuy izaw ku mikalicat a balaut, kakunas, balaut nu umah, ciyuk. sakaliam:paybuting izaw ku sulumang, ili',cuwang,lilas. sakaenem:paycilkay izaw ku adipapang, dadayday, kinkyama',balalangad. sakapitu:paylalihiw izaw ku lalihiw.
S.PHON: u saadiŇčan a aadupan kakir~…ĺiman i tajwan, u masadumaaj ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu tańßakaj , idaw ku sakas…ôn…ôŇčan nu kitakitaj a tad…ômaw kina aadińßan sa, idaw ku ajam, mikar~…ĺi ¶aj, idaw ku miŇčadujaj, idaw ku ¶ir~…ĺkaj, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj, ńßatini kajadańß nu aadińß ńßan sa, nika tada katuud tu ku tad…ômaw ajda idaw ku mitastasaj u miadupaj, sisa a mamar~…ĺawp…ôs tu ku aadupan, mabijar~…ĺaw tu ku miadiŇč tu aadupan. u sińßu mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ tu a miadiŇč tu aadupan, matar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku **, sisa misasumad tu mikuwan kina aadupan kja a idaw tu ku aadiŇčan nu aadupan kju idaw ku sakaj tini i r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu tataŇča Ē~ ° ńßan a pakatin…ôŇč tu tad…ômaw a ńßinin nu mita tina kawawan a padińßiŇč tu aadupan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ i tajwan a adiŇčan nu aadupan pitu ku masasudumaaj. saka ¶a ¶aj:pajpa ¶u ¶uwan idaw ku padaduki, uŇčaj, tumaj, sikuju, nu pujuaj a nani. paj ¶u ¶uan ńßananaj sa, u namakajniaj i nu udip nu idaŇč namakabar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj muńßanńßan kja makaj i ¶u ¶u Ē~ ° tu wasisar~…ĺaŇč tu sapa ¶u ¶u Ē~ ° tu wawa, namakajni kja ŇčaŇčan tu sasakamuan kina paj ¶u ¶uan sa (idaw kja ¶a ¶aj a ¶udad i **** tu mińß ¶aan tu nasur~…ĺitan sa, idaw a ¶a tu **** tu ja nisur~…ĺitan tu **** aj tu ¶udad, r~…ĺu ¶n tu sumanańßaj a ¶udad tu **** ńßamin) tu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a aadupan, mabur~…ĺijas i **** tu wini, *** a sasur~…ĺitan atu ** ńßamin ku namakajniaj a sapa ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan tu **%, kina aadupan i kitaki sa idaw tu *.*% saan, u siŇčip…ônaj idaw ku nu babuj nu bajuaj sa, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj tu paj ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan, u sajadańßaj a aadupan. sakatusa:pajajam izaw ku tak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺu, r~…ĺid…ôp, tur~…ĺuk nu bujuaj a banur~…ĺ, tanajuaj nu taŇčir~…ĺ a d…ôku. sakatur~…ĺu:pajnabuj izaw ku bir~…ĺaŇča Ē~ °, kakitir~…ĺ, kakuńßkuńß, ¶a ¶u ¶uńß. sakas…ôpat:pajŇčaduj nabuj izaw ku mikar~…ĺi ¶at a bar~…ĺaut, kakunas, bar~…ĺaut nu umańß, ¶ijuk. sakar~…ĺiam:pajbutiŇč izaw ku sur~…ĺumaŇč, ir~…ĺi Ē~ °, ¶uwaŇč,r~…ĺir~…ĺas. saka…ôn…ôm:paj ¶ir~…ĺkaj izaw ku adipapaŇč, dadajdaj, kinkjama Ē~ °,bar~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčad. sakapitu:pajr~…ĺar~…ĺińßiw izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺińßiw.
S.FORM: u saadingan a aadupan kakiliman i Taywan, u masadumaay ku liwliw nu tahakay , idaw ku sakasenengan nu kitakitay a tademaw kina aadihan sa, idaw ku ayam, mikalicay, idaw ku mingaduyay, idaw ku cilkay, mubahelay, hatini kayadah nu aadih han sa, nika tada katuud tu ku tademaw ayda idaw ku mitastasay u miadupay, sisa a mamalawpes tu ku aadupan, mabiyalaw tu ku miading tu aadupan. u sihu mabilil tu a miading tu aadupan, matalaw malawpes ku ŚčēÁČ©, sisa misasumad tu mikuwan kina aadupan kya a idaw tu ku aadingan nu aadupan kyu idaw ku sakay tini i lalay nu tatanga' han a pakatineng tu tademaw a hinin nu mita tina kawawan a padihing tu aadupan. nilacul i Taywan a adingan nu aadupan pitu ku masasudumaay. sakacacay:paypacucuwan idaw ku padaduki, ungay, tumay, sikuyu, nu puyuay a nani. paycucuan hananay sa, u namakayniay i nu udip nu idang namakabala'ay muhanhan kya makay i cucu' tu wasisalang tu sapacucu' tu wawa, namakayni kya ngangan tu sasakamuan kina paycucuan sa (idaw kya cacay a cudad i 2005 tu mihcaan tu nasulitan sa, idaw aca tu 5676 tu ya nisulitan tu 2008 ay tu cudad, LUCN tu sumanahay a cudad tu 5488 hamin) tu caay kalecad a aadupan, mabuliyas i 1229 tu wini, 153 a sasulitan atu 29 hamin ku namakayniay a sapacucuay a aadupan tu 10%, kina aadupan i kitaki sa idaw tu 0.4% saan, u singipenay idaw ku nu babuy nu bayuay sa, mubahelay tu paycucuay a aadupan, u sayadahay a aadupan. sakatusa:payayam izaw ku takelulu, lidep, tuluk nu buyuay a banul, tanayuay nu tangil a deku. sakatulu:paynabuy izaw ku bilanga', kakitil, kakuhkuh, cacucuh. sakasepat:payngaduy nabuy izaw ku mikalicat a balaut, kakunas, balaut nu umah, ciyuk. sakaliam:paybuting izaw ku sulumang, ili',cuwang,lilas. sakaenem:paycilkay izaw ku adipapang, dadayday, kinkyama',balalangad. sakapitu:paylalihiw izaw ku lalihiw.

miŇčadujaj, idaw ku ¶ir~…ĺkaj, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj, ńßatini kajadańß nu aadińß ńßan sa, nika tada katuud tu ku tad…ômaw ajda idaw ku mitastasaj u miadupaj, sisa a mamar~…ĺawp…ôs tu ku aadupan, mabijar~…ĺaw ¶aj:pajpa ¶u ¶uwan idaw ku padaduki, uŇčaj, tumaj, sikuju, nu pujuaj a nani. paj ¶u ¶uan ńßananaj sa, u namakajniaj i nu udip nu idaŇč namakabar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj muńßanńßan kja makaj i ¶u ¶u Ē~ ° tu aadupan tu **%, kina aadupan i kitaki sa idaw tu *.*% saan, u siŇčip…ônaj idaw ku nu babuj nu bajuaj sa, mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj tu paj ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan, u sajadańßaj a aadupan. sakatusa:pajajam izaw ku tak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺu, r~…ĺid…ôp, tur~…ĺuk nu bujuaj a banur~…ĺ, tanajuaj nu taŇčir~…ĺ a d…ôku. sakatur~…ĺu:pajnabuj izaw ku bir~…ĺaŇča Ē~ °, kakitir~…ĺ, kakuńßkuńß, ¶a ¶u ¶uńß. sakas…ôpat:pajŇčaduj nabuj
